name: Private cross-country ski lessons in Verbier

longDescription: Discover Private cross-country ski lessons in Verbier in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Cross country skiing
subcategory.description: Book your cross-country skiing course or rent your equipment now. Cross-country skiing is a popular sport in Switzerland. There is a total of over 5000 km of trails where this holistic and healthy sport can be practiced. Cross-country skiing is particularly popular in Graubünden, more precisely in the Engadine. Here, with about 1700 kilometers of trails, more than a third of all Swiss trails are available. Cross-country skiing can be practiced in two styles: Classic and Skating. For beginners, the classic style is more suitable, as it is easier to learn.

providers.name: SwissActivities
